```{r}
  geom_dl(aes(label = method),
          method = list(dl.combine("last.points"), hjust = -0.1, cex = 0.8),
          cex = 1) +
  # xlim(min(exec_times$n_cells), max(exec_times$n_cells) * 1.15) +
  NoLegend()
ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "benchmark_exec_times.pdf"),
       width = 6,
       height = 3.5, limitsize = FALSE)
```




# ---------------------------------------------------------------
# ---------------------------------------------------------------

# Plot benchmark results

## Main plot (with funkyheatmap)

```{r fig.height=6, fig.width=16}
library(funkyheatmap)

# --- 1. SETUP & CLEANING (Same as before) ---
filter_methods <- c(
  "ECODA_authors_HR",
  "ECODA_authors_HR_NULL",
  "ECODA_HiTME_HR_layer2",
  "ECODA_HiTME_HR_layer3",
  "ECODA_seuratres_2",
  "ECODA_PB_combo_normquantile_ecodaweight0.5",
  # "ECODA_authors_LR",
  "Avg_PCA_embedding",
  "Freq_highres",
  # "ECODA_deconv",
  "Pseudobulk_10_PCA_dims",
  "MOFA_hvg2000_factors15",
  "scITD_hvg2000_factors5",
  "MrVI_hvg2000",
  "scPoli_hvg2000",
  "PILOT_hvg2000",
  "GloScope_hvg2000_pcadims30_sqrtmat"
)

min_max <- function(x) {
  if (all(is.na(x))) return(x)
  if (max(x, na.rm=T) == min(x, na.rm=T)) return(x)
  (x - min(x, na.rm = TRUE)) / (max(x, na.rm = TRUE) - min(x, na.rm = TRUE))
}

df_results_bmark <- df_results
df_results_bmark$temp <- paste0(df_results_bmark$dataset, df_results_bmark$method)
exec_times$temp <- paste0(exec_times$dataset, exec_times$method)

df_results_bmark <- merge(df_results_bmark,
                          exec_times[, c("temp", "time_secs")], 
                          by = "temp", 
                          all.x = TRUE)

df_results_bmark$temp <- NULL
exec_times$temp <- NULL


clean_data <- df_results_bmark %>%
  filter(method %in% filter_methods) %>%
  mutate(method = recode(method,
                         "ECODA_authors_HR" = "ECODA_authors",
                         "ECODA_authors_HR_NULL" = "ECODA_NULL",
                         # "ECODA_HiTME_HR_layer2" = "ECODA_automated_(HiTME_layer2)",
                         # "ECODA_HiTME_HR_layer3" = "ECODA_automated_(HiTME_layer3)",
                         "ECODA_seuratres_2" = "ECODA_unsupervised",
                         "ECODA_PB_combo_normquantile_ecodaweight0.5" = "ECODA+Pseudobulk",
                         "Pseudobulk_10_PCA_dims" = "Pseudobulk",
                         "Freq_highres" = "ECODA_Freq%",
                         "MOFA_hvg2000_factors15" = "MOFA",
                         "scITD_hvg2000_factors5" = "scITD",
                         "MrVI_hvg2000" = "MrVI",
                         "scPoli_hvg2000" = "scPoli",
                         "scITD_2_factors" = "scITD",
                         "PILOT_hvg2000" = "PILOT",
                         "GloScope_hvg2000_pcadims30_sqrtmat" = "GloScope")) %>%
  mutate(score = recode(score,
                        "anosim_score" = "ANOSIM",
                        "mod_knn3_score" = "Modularity",
                        "cluster_score" = "ARI")) %>%
  mutate(dataset = recode(dataset,
                          "GongSharma_all_age" = "GongSharma_age",
                          "GongSharma_all_cmv" = "GongSharma_cmv",
                          "GongSharma_all_sex" = "GongSharma_sex"))

# --- 2. CALCULATE GEOMETRIC MEAN OF RANKS (NEW STEP) ---
df_ranks <- clean_data %>%
  # Group by specific test case
  group_by(dataset, score) %>% 
  # Rank: Higher Value = Better Rank (1). Ties get the minimum rank.
  mutate(rank = rank(-value, ties.method = "min")) %>% 
  ungroup() %>%
  # Now aggregate per method
  group_by(method) %>% 
  # Calculate Geometric Mean: exp(mean(log(x)))
  summarise(geo_mean_rank = exp(mean(log(rank), na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  # Normalize so it plots nicely (0 to 1). 
  # We INVERT it so Best Rank (lowest number) = 1.0 (biggest bar)
  mutate(Rank_Score = (max(geo_mean_rank) - geo_mean_rank) / 
           (max(geo_mean_rank) - min(geo_mean_rank))) %>%
  select(method, Rank_Score)

# --- 3. SCALE DATA (0-1) FOR HEATMAP VISUALS ---
scaled_data <- clean_data %>%
  group_by(dataset, score) %>%
  mutate(value = min_max(value)) %>%
  ungroup()

# --- 4. AGGREGATE SCORES ---

# A. Overall Score (Arithmetic Mean of Scaled Values)
df_overall <- scaled_data %>%
  group_by(method) %>%
  summarise(Overall_Score = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE)) 

# B. Dataset Scores
df_datasets_wide <- scaled_data %>%
  group_by(method, dataset) %>%
  summarise(value = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(id_cols = method, names_from = dataset, values_from = value, names_prefix = "Dataset__")

# C. Metric Scores
df_metrics_wide <- scaled_data %>%
  group_by(method, score) %>%
  summarise(value = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(id_cols = method, names_from = score, values_from = value, names_prefix = "Metric__")

# D. Execution times
df_runtime <- clean_data %>%
  # distinct() is crucial! clean_data has 3 rows per dataset (one per score).
  # We only want to count the execution time once per dataset.
  distinct(method, dataset, time_secs) %>% 
  group_by(method) %>%
  summarise(value = mean(time_secs, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  # IMPORTANT: We must scale this 0-1 because your funkyheatmap has scale_column = FALSE
  mutate(value = min_max(value)) %>% 
  rename(Runtime = value)

# --- 5. MERGE EVERYTHING ---
final_data <- df_overall %>%
  left_join(df_ranks, by = "method") %>% # <--- Join the new Rank Score
  left_join(df_datasets_wide, by = "method") %>%
  left_join(df_metrics_wide, by = "method") %>%
  left_join(df_runtime, by = "method") %>%
  arrange(desc(Rank_Score)) # Optional: sort by the new Rank Score instead

# --- 6. BUILD COLUMN INFO ---

# 1. Fixed Columns (Updated to include Rank_Score)
info_fixed <- tribble(
  ~id,             ~group,    ~name,           ~geom,  ~palette,        ~options,
  "method",        "",        "",              "text", NA,              list(hjust = 0, width = 8),
  "Rank_Score",    "Overall", "GeoMean Rank",  "bar",  "palette_avg_rank",   list(width = 4, legend = FALSE),
  "Overall_Score", "Overall", "Overall Score", "bar",  "palette_avg_mean",   list(width = 4, legend = FALSE)
)

# 2. Dataset Columns
dataset_cols <- colnames(final_data)[startsWith(colnames(final_data), "Dataset__")]
info_datasets <- tibble(id = dataset_cols) %>%
  mutate(
    group = "Datasets",
    name = str_remove(id, "Dataset__"), 
    geom = "funkyrect",
    palette = "palette_A",
    options = list(list())
  ) %>% arrange(name)

# 3. Metric Columns
metric_cols <- colnames(final_data)[startsWith(colnames(final_data), "Metric__")]
target_metric_order <- c("ANOSIM", "Modularity", "ARI")
info_metrics <- tibble(id = metric_cols) %>%
  mutate(
    group = "Metrics",
    name = str_remove(id, "Metric__"),
    geom = "funkyrect",
    palette = "palette_B",
    options = list(list()),
    name_f = factor(name, levels = target_metric_order)
  ) %>% arrange(name_f) %>% select(-name_f)

# 4. Runtime Column (Manually added since it's just one column now)
info_runtime <- tribble(
  ~id,       ~group,      ~name,         ~geom,       ~palette,     ~options,
  "Runtime", "Resources", "Runtime (s)", "funkyrect", "palette_C",  list(legend = FALSE)
)

# Combine
column_info <- bind_rows(info_fixed, info_datasets, info_metrics, info_runtime)

# --- 7. PLOT ---
funky_heatmap(
  final_data,
  column_info = column_info,
  scale_column = FALSE, 
  column_groups = tibble(
    group = c("Overall", "Datasets", "Metrics", "Resources")
  ),
  palettes = list(
    palette_avg_rank = "Greys",
    palette_avg_mean = "Greys",
    palette_A = "Blues",
    palette_B = "Reds",
    palette_C = "YlOrBr"),
  position_args = position_arguments(
    col_width = 1.5,
    col_space = 0.2
  )
)
```



# ---------------------------------------------------------------
# ---------------------------------------------------------------

# Plot normalization results

## Plot results

```{r}
df_results <- Reduce(rbind, result_list[["trans"]]) %>%
  mutate(trans_method = recode(trans_method,
                         "clr" = "CLR",
                         "alr_mincvref" = "ALR_minCVref",
                         "alr_randref" = "ALR_randref",
                         "arcsine_sqrt" = "Arcsine_sqrt",
                         "counts" = "Counts",
                         "freq" = "Frequency(%)"))

df_results_list[["Normalization"]] <- df_results


df_results <- df_results %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(ANOSIM_score, Modularity_score, Adjusted_Rand_Index),
    names_to = "score",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  as.data.frame()

df_results_anosim <- df_results %>%
  filter(score == "ANOSIM_score") %>%
  group_by(trans_method) %>%
  summarize(mean = mean(value), sem = sd(value) / sqrt(length(value)))

df_results_anosim <- df_results_anosim %>%
  arrange(desc(mean))

df_results_anosim$trans_method <- factor(df_results_anosim$trans_method, levels = df_results_anosim$trans_method)
df_results$trans_method <- factor(df_results$trans_method, levels = df_results_anosim$trans_method)



df_results %>%
  group_by(score, trans_method) %>%
  summarize(mean = mean(value), sem = sd(value) / sqrt(length(value))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  ggplot(aes(x = trans_method, y = mean)) + 
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge()) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=mean-sem, ymax=mean+sem), width=0.2, colour="black", alpha=0.9) +
  labs(x = "", y = "") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 75, vjust = 1, hjust=1)) +
  facet_grid(scales = "free",
             rows = vars(score),
             labeller = labeller(score = score.labs))
ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "transformations_real_datasets_summary_barplot_separatescores_bars.pdf"),
       width = 7,
       height = 7)


df_results %>%
  filter(score == "ANOSIM_score") %>%
  
  ggplot(aes(x = trans_method, y = value)) +
  stat_summary(fun.data = "mean_se", geom = "errorbar", width = 0.2) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "bar", fill = "gray70") +
  geom_point(position = "identity", alpha = 0.6, size = 1) +
  geom_line(aes(group = dataset), color = "grey20", alpha = 0.1) +
  stat_compare_means(
    ref.group = "CLR",
    method = "wilcox.test",
    paired = TRUE,
    # angle = 25,
    # aes(label = sprintf("%5.2f", as.numeric(..p.format..))),
    aes(label = after_stat(p.signif)),
    size = 3,
    label.y = 0.9
  ) +
  labs(x = "", y = "ANOSIM score") +
  theme_classic2() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 65, vjust = 1, hjust = 1)) +
  ylim(c(-0.1, 1))
ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "transformations_real_datasets_summary_barplot_anosim_refCLR.pdf"),
       width = 2.5,
       height = 3.5)



my_comparisons <- list(
  c("CLR", "Frequency(%)"),
  c("CLR", "Counts")
  )

df_results %>%
  filter(score == "ANOSIM_score") %>%
  filter(trans_method %in% c("Counts", "Frequency(%)", "CLR")) %>%
  
  ggplot(aes(x = fct_reorder(trans_method, value, .desc = FALSE, .fun = mean), y = value, fill = ifelse(trans_method == "CLR", "lightgreen", "gray70"))) +
  stat_summary(fun.data = "mean_se", geom = "errorbar", width = 0.2) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "bar") +
  geom_point(position = "identity", alpha = 0.6, size = 0.7) +
  geom_line(aes(group = dataset), color = "grey20", alpha = 0.1) +
  stat_compare_means(
    comparisons = my_comparisons,
    method = "wilcox.test",
    paired = TRUE,
    size = 3,
    tip.length = 0,
    # label.y = 0.95,
    aes(label = after_stat(p.signif))
  ) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Separation of biological groups\n(ANOSIM score)") +
  theme_classic2(base_size = 12) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1, size = 12),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank()) +
  ylim(c(-0.05, 1)) +
  scale_fill_identity() +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c(
    "Counts",
    "Frequency(%)",
    expression(bold("CLR")) # Make label bold
  ))
ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "POSTER_transformations_real_datasets_summary_barplot_anosim_refCLR.pdf"),
       width = 2,
       height = 3.5)





# New facet label names for dose variable
score.labs <- c("Adjusted rand index", "ANOSIM score", "Modularity score")
names(score.labs) <- sort(unique(df_results$score))

# New facet label names for supp variable
datas.labs <- sort(unique(df_results$dataset))
datas.labs[datas.labs == "GongSharma_cmv_females"] <- "Gong & Sharma\nSubset: females\nSeparation by: CMV infection"
datas.labs[datas.labs == "GongSharma_age_females_cmvneg"] <- "Gong & Sharma\nSubset: CMV negative females\nSeparation by: age"
names(datas.labs) <- sort(unique(df_results$dataset))



ggplot(df_results, aes(x = trans_method, y = value)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge()) +
  labs(x = "",
       y = "Separation score") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1),
        legend.position = "none") +
  facet_grid(score ~ dataset,
             scales = "free",
             labeller = labeller(score = score.labs, dataset = datas.labs))
# facet_grid(scales = "free",
#            rows = vars(score_method), cols = vars(dataset))
ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "transformations_real_datasets_detailed_barplot.pdf"),
       width = 8,
       height = 7)



# df_results %>%
#   group_by(score_method, method) %>%
#   summarize(mean = mean(values), sem = sd(values) / sqrt(length(values))) %>%
#   ungroup() %>%
#   
#   ggplot(aes(x = method, y = mean)) + 
#   geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge()) +
#   # stat_summary(fun.y = mean, geom = "bar") +
#   geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=mean-sem, ymax=mean+sem), width=0.2, colour="black", alpha=0.9) +
#   # geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge()) +
#   labs(x = "", y = "Separation score") +
#   theme_minimal() +
#   theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust=1)) +
#   facet_grid(scales = "free",
#              rows = vars(score_method),
#              labeller = labeller(score_method = score.labs))


ggplot(df_results, aes(x = trans_method, y = value)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_point(aes(shape=dataset)) + 
  geom_line(aes(group=dataset, linetype=dataset), alpha = 1, color = "steelblue") +
  # geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge()) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Separation score") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust=1)) +
  facet_grid(scales = "free",
             rows = vars(score),
             labeller = labeller(score = score.labs))

ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "transformations_real_datasets_summary_barplot_separatescores.pdf"),
       width = 5,
       height = 5)



# df_results_anosim %>%
#   ggplot(aes(x = method, y = mean)) + 
#   geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge()) +
#   # stat_summary(fun.y = mean, geom = "bar") +
#   geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=mean-sem, ymax=mean+sem), width=0.2, colour="black", alpha=0.9) +
#   # geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge()) +
#   labs(x = "", y = "Adjusted Rand Index") +
#   theme_minimal() +
#   theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust=1)) +
#   NoLegend()


df_results_anosim <- df_results %>%
  filter(score == "ANOSIM_score")

df_results_anosim <- df_results_anosim[!grepl("pca", df_results_anosim$trans_method), ]

# Example assuming 'data' is your dataframe
anova_result <- aov(value ~ trans_method, data = df_results_anosim)
summary(anova_result)
stat.test <- tukey_hsd(anova_result)
stat.test
stat.test$p.adj <- round(stat.test$p.adj, 3)
# stat.test <- stat.test[["method"]] %>% as.data.frame()
# 
# # Extract row names where p adj < 0.05
# significant_comparisons <- rownames(stat.test)[stat.test[["p adj"]] < 0.05]
# 
# # Initialize an empty list to store results
# my_comparisons <- list()
# 
# # Split and store each comparison in the list
# for (comparison in significant_comparisons) {
#   parts <- strsplit(comparison, "-")[[1]]
#   my_comparisons <- c(my_comparisons, list(parts))
# }

my_comparisons <- purrr::map(unique(as.character(df_results_anosim$trans_method)), ~ c(.x, "Frequency(%)"))
my_comparisons <- Filter(function(x) length(unique(x)) == 2, my_comparisons)
# my_comparisons <- c(my_comparisons, list(c("clr", "arcsine_sqrt")))
my_comparisons <- my_comparisons[c(4, 3, 2, 1, 5)]

# my_comparisons <- list(
#   c("alr_mincvref", "freq"),
#   c("alr_randref", "freq"),
#   c("arcsine_sqrt", "freq"),
#   c("clr", "freq"),
#   c("clr_pca", "freq"),
#   c("counts", "freq")
#   )

ggplot(df_results_anosim, aes(x = trans_method, y = value)) +
  stat_compare_means(
    comparisons = my_comparisons,
    # p.adjust.method = "bonferroni",
    # ref.group = "freq",
    method = "wilcox.test",
    paired = TRUE,
    # aes(label = sprintf("p = %5.2f", as.numeric(..p.format..)))
    aes(label = after_stat(p.signif))
  ) + # Add pairwise comparisons p-value
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_point(aes(shape=dataset)) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=1:length(unique((df_results_anosim$dataset)))) +
  geom_line(aes(group=dataset, linetype=dataset), alpha = 1, color = "steelblue") +
  labs(x = "", y = "ANOSIM score") +
  # stat_pvalue_manual(stat.test, label = "p.adj", 
  #                    y.position = c(max(df_results_anosim$values)+0.1, max(df_results_anosim$values)+0.2), hide.ns = TRUE) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust=1))

ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "transformations_real_datasets_summary_barplot.pdf"),
       width = 6,
       height = 4.5)


ggplot(df_results_anosim, aes(x = trans_method, y = value)) +
  stat_compare_means(
    # comparisons = my_comparisons,
    # p.adjust.method = "bonferroni",
    ref.group = "CLR",
    method = "wilcox.test",
    paired = TRUE,
    # aes(label = sprintf("p = %5.2f", as.numeric(..p.format..)))
    aes(label = after_stat(p.signif))
  ) + # Add pairwise comparisons p-value
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_point(aes(shape=dataset)) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=1:length(unique((df_results_anosim$dataset)))) +
  geom_line(aes(group=dataset, linetype=dataset), alpha = 1, color = "steelblue") +
  labs(x = "", y = "ANOSIM score") +
  # stat_pvalue_manual(stat.test, label = "p.adj", 
  #                    y.position = c(max(df_results_anosim$values)+0.1, max(df_results_anosim$values)+0.2), hide.ns = TRUE) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust=1))

```

# Statistical comparison

```{r}
df_results_anosim <- df_results %>%
  filter(score_method == "ANOSIM_score")

# Example assuming 'data' is your dataframe
anova_result <- aov(values ~ trans_method, data = df_results_anosim)
summary(anova_result)

TukeyHSD(aov(df_results_anosim$values ~ df_results_anosim$trans_method))
```




# ---------------------------------------------------------------
# ---------------------------------------------------------------

# Plot zero imputation results

```{r}
zeroimp_result_list <- result_list[["zeroimp"]]
```


## Plot results

```{r}
df_results <- imap_dfr(zeroimp_result_list, ~ {
  dataset_name <- .y
  imap_dfr(.x, ~ {
    method_name <- .y
    imap_dfr(.x, ~ {
      tibble(
        dataset = dataset_name,
        method = method_name,
        score = .y,
        value = .x
      )
    })
  })
})

df_results <- df_results[df_results$method != "impRZilr", ]

df_results_list[["Zero_imputation"]] <- df_results

df_results %>%
  filter(score == "anosim_score") %>%
  filter(method != "asinsqrt") %>%
  
  ggplot(aes(x = method, y = value)) +
  stat_summary(fun.data = "mean_se", geom = "errorbar", width = 0.2) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "bar", fill = "gray70") +
  geom_point(position = "identity", alpha = 0.6, size = 1) +
  geom_line(aes(group = dataset), color = "grey20", alpha = 0.2) +
  stat_compare_means(
    ref.group = "counts_zeros_1",
    method = "wilcox.test",
    paired = TRUE,
    # angle = 25,
    label.y = 0.93,
    aes(label = after_stat(p.signif))
    # aes(label = sprintf("%5.2f", as.numeric(..p.format..)))
  ) +
  ylim(c(-0.15, 1)) +
  labs(x = "", y = "ANOSIM score") +
  theme_classic2() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 65, vjust = 1, hjust = 1))
ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "zero_imputation_real_datasets_summary_barplot_ANOSIM.pdf"),
       width = 4,
       height = 4)


# New facet label names for dose variable
score.labs <- c("Adjusted rand index", "Modularity score", "ANOSIM score")
names(score.labs) <- sort(unique(df_results$score))

# New facet label names for supp variable
datas.labs <- sort(unique(df_results$dataset))
datas.labs[datas.labs == "GongSharma_cmv_females"] <- "Gong & Sharma\nSubset: females\nSeparation by: CMV infection"
datas.labs[datas.labs == "GongSharma_age_females_cmvneg"] <- "Gong & Sharma\nSubset: CMV negative females\nSeparation by: age"
names(datas.labs) <- sort(unique(df_results$dataset))


ggplot(df_results, aes(x = method, y = value)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge()) +
  labs(x = "Imputation method",
       y = "Separation") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1),
        legend.position = "none") +
  facet_grid(score ~ dataset,
             scales = "free",
             labeller = labeller(score = score.labs, dataset = datas.labs))
  # facet_grid(scales = "free",
  #            rows = vars(score), cols = vars(dataset))
ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "zero_imputation_real_datasets_detailed_barplot.pdf"),
       width = 10,
       height = 6)




df_results %>%
  group_by(score, method) %>%
  summarize(mean = mean(value), sem = sd(value) / sqrt(length(value))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%

  ggplot(aes(x = method, y = mean)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge()) +
  # stat_summary(fun.y = mean, geom = "bar") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=mean-sem, ymax=mean+sem), width=0.2, colour="black", alpha=0.9) +
  # geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge()) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Separation score") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 65, vjust = 1, hjust=1)) +
  facet_grid(scales = "free",
             rows = vars(score),
             labeller = labeller(score = score.labs))

ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "zero_imputation_real_datasets_summary_barplot_separatescores.pdf"),
       width = 3.5,
       height = 6)

ggplot(df_results, aes(x = method, y = value)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_point(aes(shape=dataset)) + 
  geom_line(aes(group=dataset, linetype=dataset), alpha = 1, color = "steelblue") +
  # geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge()) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Separation score") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust=1)) +
  facet_grid(scales = "free",
             rows = vars(score),
             labeller = labeller(score = score.labs))

ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "zero_imputation_real_datasets_summary_boxplot_separatescores.pdf"),
       width = 7,
       height = 6)



df_results %>%
  filter(score == "cluster_score") %>%
  group_by(method) %>%
  summarize(mean = mean(value), sem = sd(value) / sqrt(length(value))) %>%
  
  ggplot(aes(x = method, y = mean)) + 
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge()) +
  # stat_summary(fun.y = mean, geom = "bar") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=mean-sem, ymax=mean+sem), width=0.2, colour="black", alpha=0.9) +
  # geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge()) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Adjusted Rand Index") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust=1)) +
  NoLegend()


df_results %>%
  filter(score == "anosim_score") %>%
  group_by(method) %>%
  summarize(mean = mean(value), sem = sd(value) / sqrt(length(value))) %>%
  
  ggplot(aes(x = method, y = mean)) + 
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge()) +
  # stat_summary(fun.y = mean, geom = "bar") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=mean-sem, ymax=mean+sem), width=0.2, colour="black", alpha=0.9) +
  # geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge()) +
  labs(x = "", y = "ANOSIM score") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust=1)) +
  NoLegend()


df_results_clustering <- df_results %>%
  filter(score == "cluster_score")

my_comparisons <- purrr::map(unique(as.character(df_results_clustering$method)), ~ c(.x, "counts_all_1"))
my_comparisons <- Filter(function(x) length(unique(x)) == 2, my_comparisons)
my_comparisons <- my_comparisons[c(6,1,7:10, 2:5)]
# my_comparisons[[length(my_comparisons) + 1]] <- c("perc_all_0.1%", "perc_all_1%")

p <- ggplot(df_results_clustering, aes(x = method, y = value)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_point(aes(shape=dataset)) + 
  geom_line(aes(group=dataset, linetype=dataset), alpha = 1, color = "steelblue") +
  stat_compare_means(
    comparisons = my_comparisons,
    method = "t.test",
    paired = TRUE,
    # aes(label = sprintf("p = %5.2f", as.numeric(..p.format..)))
    aes(label = after_stat(p.signif))
  ) + # Add pairwise comparisons p-value
  # geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge()) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Adjusted Rand Index") +
  scale_shape_manual(values=1:length(unique((df_results_clustering$dataset)))) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust=1))
print(p)
ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "zero_imputation_real_datasets_summary_boxplot_clusterscore.pdf"),
       width = 8,
       height = 6)

df_results_modularity <- df_results %>%
  filter(score == "mod_score")

p <- ggplot(df_results_modularity, aes(x = method, y = value)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  # geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge()) +
  geom_point(aes(shape=dataset)) + 
  geom_line(aes(group=dataset, linetype=dataset), alpha = 1, color = "steelblue") +
  stat_compare_means(
    comparisons = my_comparisons,
    method = "t.test",
    paired = TRUE,
    # aes(label = sprintf("p = %5.2f", as.numeric(..p.format..)))
    aes(label = after_stat(p.signif))
  ) + # Add pairwise comparisons p-value
  # geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge()) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Modularity score") +
  scale_shape_manual(values=1:length(unique((df_results_modularity$dataset)))) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust=1))
print(p)
ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "zero_imputation_real_datasets_summary_boxplot_modscore.pdf"),
       width = 8,
       height = 6)


df_results_anosim <- df_results %>%
  filter(score == "anosim_score")

p <- ggplot(df_results_anosim, aes(x = method, y = value)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  # geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge()) +
  geom_point(aes(shape=dataset)) + 
  geom_line(aes(group=dataset, linetype=dataset), alpha = 1, color = "steelblue") +
  stat_compare_means(
    comparisons = my_comparisons,
    method = "t.test",
    paired = TRUE,
    # aes(label = sprintf("p = %5.2f", as.numeric(..p.format..)))
    aes(label = after_stat(p.signif))
  ) + # Add pairwise comparisons p-value
  # geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge()) +
  labs(x = "", y = "ANOSIM score") +
  scale_shape_manual(values=1:length(unique((df_results_anosim$dataset)))) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust=1))
print(p)
ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "zero_imputation_real_datasets_summary_boxplot_anosimscore.pdf"),
       width = 8,
       height = 6)

```

# Test for statistical significance

To few data points for statistical significance

```{r}
library(rstatix)

df_results_cluster <- df_results %>% filter(score == "cluster_score")

outlier <- df_results_cluster %>%
  group_by(method) %>%
  rstatix::identify_outliers(value)
data.frame(outlier)

normality <- df_results_cluster %>%
  group_by(method) %>%
  rstatix::shapiro_test(value)
data.frame(normality)
cat(paste("All groups normally ditributed?", all(normality$p > 0.05),
            "\nNot normally distributed:", normality$method[normality$p <= 0.05]))

# res <- rstatix::anova_test(data = df_results_cluster, dv = value, wid = dataset, within = method) 
# rstatix::get_anova_table(res)
# 
# pair_t <- df_results_cluster %>%
#   rstatix::pairwise_t_test(value~method, paired=TRUE, p.adjust.method = "BH" )
# data.frame(pair_t)

# Example assuming 'data' is your dataframe
anova_result <- aov(value ~ method, data = df_results_cluster)
summary(anova_result)




df_results_cluster <- df_results %>% filter(score == "mod_score")

# Example assuming 'data' is your dataframe
anova_result <- aov(value ~ method, data = df_results_cluster)
summary(anova_result)



df_results_cluster <- df_results %>% filter(score == "sil_score")

# Example assuming 'data' is your dataframe
anova_result <- aov(value ~ method, data = df_results_cluster)
summary(anova_result)
```

# ---------------------------------------------------------------
# ---------------------------------------------------------------

# Export tables with raw data for paper

```{r}
library(writexl)
write_xlsx(df_results_list, path = file.path(path_data, "raw_data_for_publication.xlsx"))
```
